name: Naturepedia Information Systems Knowledge Mesh
description: Paid relationship mesh connecting biological communication, signal propagation, ecological networks, biological memory, feedback loops, distributed intelligence, ecological computation, and living information fields.
architecture: Information Systems → Biological Communication → Signal Propagation → Ecological Networks → Biological Memory → Feedback Loops → Distributed Intelligence → Ecological Computation → Living Information Fields

relationshipMesh.relationship: Living organisms exchange information through chemical, electrical, visual, acoustic, microbial, fungal, and behavioral signals.
Signals move through organisms, roots, soils, fungal networks, water, air, and ecological communities.
Signal propagation creates interconnected ecological communication networks.
Networks preserve adaptive memory through repeated ecological interactions.
Stored biological information guides future ecological responses through feedback.
Distributed intelligence emerges from many interconnected feedback systems.
Living systems continuously compute environmental conditions through distributed processing.
Information processing scales into landscape-wide living information systems.
